================================================================================
  SNGCE COLLEGE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM
  Important Code Blocks for Project Report
  Sree Narayana Gurukulam College of Engineering, Kadayirippu, Ernakulam
================================================================================


TECH STACK SUMMARY
==================
  Layer              Technology
  -----------------  ------------------------------------------
  Backend            Motoko (Internet Computer Canister)
  Database           IC Stable Memory (built-in, no external DB)
  Frontend           React + TypeScript
  Routing            TanStack Router
  UI Components      shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS
  State Management   Context API
  AI Chatbot         Groq API (Llama 3.3-70B)
  Hosting            Internet Computer (ICP)


================================================================================
  SECTION 1: BACKEND — main.mo (Motoko / Internet Computer)
================================================================================

1.1 DATA TYPES
--------------

public type UserProfile = {
  name : Text;
  role : Text;
  studentId : ?Text;
};

type Student = {
  studentId : Text;
  firstName : Text;
  lastName : Text;
  department : Text;
  degree : Degree;
};

type Subject = {
  subjectId : Text;
  name : Text;
  code : Text;
  year : Nat;
  semester : Nat;
  department : Text;
};

type Attendance = {
  subjectId : Text;
  percentage : Float;
};

type Marks = {
  subjectId : Text;
  examType : Text;
  marks : Int;
};

type Exam = {
  examId : Text;
  subjectId : Text;
  examType : Text;
  date : Time.Time;
};

type FeesDue = {
  amount : Float;
  dueDate : Time.Time;
  yearSemester : Text;
};

type AcademicRecord = {
  student : Student;
  subjects : [Subject];
  attendance : [Attendance];
  marks : [Marks];
  exams : [Exam];
  feesDue : [FeesDue];
};


1.2 STABLE STATE (Persistent Storage)
--------------------------------------

stable var adminCourses : [AdminCourse] = [];
stable var adminFeeEntries : [AdminFeeEntry] = [];
stable var adminFacultyList : [AdminFacultyMember] = [];


1.3 ACCESS CONTROL
------------------

func canAccessStudentRecord(caller : Principal, studentId : Text) : Bool {
  if (AccessControl.isAdmin(accessControlState, caller)) {
    return true;
  };
  switch (studentPrincipalMap.get(caller)) {
    case (?callerStudentId) { callerStudentId == studentId };
    case (null) { false };
  };
};


1.4 PROTECTED QUERY — GET STUDENT RECORD
-----------------------------------------

public query ({ caller }) func getStudentRecord(studentId : Text) : async AcademicRecord {
  if (not canAccessStudentRecord(caller, studentId)) {
    Runtime.trap("Unauthorized");
  };
  switch (academicRecordsStore.get(studentId)) {
    case (?record) { record };
    case (null) { Runtime.trap("Student record not found") };
  };
};


1.5 ADMIN CRUD — COURSES
------------------------

public shared ({ caller }) func addAdminCourse(course : AdminCourse) : async () {
  if (not AccessControl.isAdmin(accessControlState, caller)) {
    Runtime.trap("Unauthorized: Only admin can add courses");
  };
  adminCourses := adminCourses.concat([course]);
};

public shared ({ caller }) func removeAdminCourse(branch : Text) : async () {
  if (not AccessControl.isAdmin(accessControlState, caller)) {
    Runtime.trap("Unauthorized: Only admin can remove courses");
  };
  adminCourses := adminCourses.filter(func(c) { c.branch != branch });
};


1.6 ADMIN CRUD — FEES
---------------------

public shared ({ caller }) func upsertAdminFeeEntry(entry : AdminFeeEntry) : async () {
  if (not AccessControl.isAdmin(accessControlState, caller)) {
    Runtime.trap("Unauthorized: Only admin can update fees");
  };
  let existing = adminFeeEntries.find(func(f) { f.courseBranch == entry.courseBranch });
  switch (existing) {
    case (?_) {
      adminFeeEntries := adminFeeEntries.map(func(f) {
        if (f.courseBranch == entry.courseBranch) { entry } else { f }
      });
    };
    case (null) {
      adminFeeEntries := adminFeeEntries.concat([entry]);
    };
  };
};


1.7 ADMIN CRUD — FACULTY
------------------------

public shared ({ caller }) func addAdminFaculty(member : AdminFacultyMember) : async () {
  if (not AccessControl.isAdmin(accessControlState, caller)) {
    Runtime.trap("Unauthorized: Only admin can add faculty");
  };
  adminFacultyList := adminFacultyList.concat([member]);
};

public shared ({ caller }) func removeAdminFaculty(name : Text, department : Text) : async () {
  if (not AccessControl.isAdmin(accessControlState, caller)) {
    Runtime.trap("Unauthorized: Only admin can remove faculty");
  };
  adminFacultyList := adminFacultyList.filter(func(f) {
    not (f.name == name and f.department == department)
  });
};


1.8 STUDENT-OWNED RECORD QUERY
-------------------------------

public query ({ caller }) func getOwnRecord() : async AcademicRecord {
  if (not (AccessControl.hasPermission(accessControlState, caller, #user))) {
    Runtime.trap("Unauthorized");
  };
  switch (studentPrincipalMap.get(caller)) {
    case (?studentId) {
      switch (academicRecordsStore.get(studentId)) {
        case (?record) { record };
        case (null) { Runtime.trap("Student record not found") };
      };
    };
    case (null) { Runtime.trap("No student ID associated with this user") };
  };
};


1.9 CHATBOT FAQ QUERY
---------------------

public query func getChatbotResponse(message : Text) : async Text {
  let normalizedMessage = normalize(message);
  func findFaqEntry(faq : FAQEntry) : Bool {
    func keywordMatches(keyword : Text) : Bool {
      textContains(normalizedMessage, normalize(keyword));
    };
    switch (faq.keywords.find(keywordMatches)) {
      case (?_) { true };
      case (null) { false };
    };
  };
  switch (faqEntries.find(findFaqEntry)) {
    case (?entry) { entry.response };
    case (null) {
      "I can help you with SNGCE admissions, fees, courses, faculty and placement information.";
    };
  };
};


================================================================================
  SECTION 2: FRONTEND — AuthContext.tsx (Role-Based Authentication)
================================================================================

export type UserRole = "student" | "staff" | "admin" | null;

interface AuthState {
  isLoggedIn: boolean;
  role: UserRole;
  studentId: string | null;
  userName: string | null;
}

const AUTH_KEY = "sngce_auth";

export function AuthProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const [auth, setAuth] = useState<AuthState>(() => {
    try {
      const stored = localStorage.getItem(AUTH_KEY);
      return stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : defaultState;
    } catch {
      return defaultState;
    }
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    localStorage.setItem(AUTH_KEY, JSON.stringify(auth));
  }, [auth]);

  const login = useCallback(
    (role: NonNullable<UserRole>, name: string, studentId?: string) => {
      setAuth({
        isLoggedIn: true,
        role,
        studentId: studentId ?? null,
        userName: name,
      });
    },
    [],
  );

  const logout = useCallback(() => {
    setAuth(defaultState);
  }, []);

  return (
    <AuthContext.Provider value={{ ...auth, login, logout }}>
      {children}
    </AuthContext.Provider>
  );
}

export function useAuth() {
  return useContext(AuthContext);
}


================================================================================
  SECTION 3: FRONTEND — groqApi.ts (AI Chatbot with Role-Based Context)
================================================================================

3.1 INTERFACES
--------------

export interface StudentAttendanceEntry {
  subject: string;
  present: number;
  total: number;
  percentage: number;
}

export interface StudentMarkEntry {
  subject: string;
  examType: string;
  marks: number;
}

export interface StudentFeeEntry {
  description: string;
  amount: number;
}

export interface StudentExamEntry {
  subject: string;
  examType: string;
  date: string;
}

export interface StudentData {
  attendance: StudentAttendanceEntry[];
  marks: StudentMarkEntry[];
  fees: StudentFeeEntry[];
  exams: StudentExamEntry[];
  department: string;
  year: string;
}

export interface UserContext {
  role?: string | null;
  studentId?: string | null;
  userName?: string | null;
  studentData?: StudentData;
}


3.2 GROQ API CALL WITH ROLE-BASED CONTEXT INJECTION
----------------------------------------------------

export async function callGroq(
  userMessage: string,
  history: GroqMessage[],
  userContext?: UserContext,
): Promise<{ text: string; redirect?: string }> {
  let contextMsg: string | null = null;

  if (userContext?.role === "student") {
    const sd = userContext.studentData;
    let dataBlock = "";
    if (sd) {
      const attLines =
        sd.attendance.length > 0
          ? sd.attendance
              .map(
                (a) =>
                  `  - ${a.subject}: ${a.present}/${a.total} classes attended (${a.percentage}%)`,
              )
              .join("\n")
          : "  - No attendance records yet";

      const marksLines =
        sd.marks.length > 0
          ? sd.marks
              .map((m) => `  - ${m.subject} [${m.examType}]: ${m.marks} marks`)
              .join("\n")
          : "  - No marks recorded yet";

      const feesLines =
        sd.fees.length > 0
          ? sd.fees
              .map((f) => `  - ${f.description}: Rs.${f.amount}`)
              .join("\n")
          : "  - No outstanding fees";

      const examLines =
        sd.exams.length > 0
          ? sd.exams
              .map((e) => `  - ${e.subject} [${e.examType}] on ${e.date}`)
              .join("\n")
          : "  - No upcoming exams scheduled";

      dataBlock = `

STUDENT ACADEMIC DATA (real-time from the system):
Department: ${sd.department}
Year: ${sd.year}

Subject-wise Attendance:
${attLines}

Marks/Grades:
${marksLines}

Fees Due:
${feesLines}

Upcoming Exams:
${examLines}`;
    }
    contextMsg = `ACTIVE USER: Student "${userContext.userName}".
Student ID: ${userContext.studentId}.${sd ? dataBlock : ""}`;

  } else if (userContext?.role === "staff") {
    contextMsg = `ACTIVE USER: Staff "${userContext.userName}".
    Full access to student records. Help with attendance and marks entry.`;

  } else if (userContext?.role === "admin") {
    contextMsg = `ACTIVE USER: Admin "${userContext.userName}".
    Full institutional access. Help with course, faculty, fees, classified management.`;
  }

  const messages = [
    { role: "system" as const, content: SYSTEM_PROMPT },
    ...history,
    ...(contextMsg ? [{ role: "system" as const, content: contextMsg }] : []),
    { role: "user" as const, content: userMessage },
  ];

  const response = await fetch("https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions", {
    method: "POST",
    headers: {
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      Authorization: `Bearer ${GROQ_API_KEY}`,
    },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      model: "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
      messages,
      temperature: 0.8,
      max_tokens: 1500,
    }),
  });

  if (!response.ok) {
    throw new Error(`Groq API ${response.status}`);
  }

  const data = await response.json();
  const rawText: string = data?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content ?? "";

  const navigateMatch = rawText.match(/NAVIGATE:(\S+)/);
  const redirect = navigateMatch ? navigateMatch[1] : undefined;
  const text = rawText.replace(/NAVIGATE:\S+/g, "").trim();

  return { text, redirect };
}


================================================================================
  SECTION 4: FRONTEND — ChatbotWidget.tsx (Chat UI Component)
================================================================================

4.1 ATTENDANCE READ FROM LOCAL STORAGE (Staff-entered data)
------------------------------------------------------------

function readAttendanceFromLS(
  studentId: string | null,
): { subject: string; present: number; total: number; percentage: number }[] {
  if (!studentId) return [];
  try {
    const raw = localStorage.getItem(LS_CLASS_ATTENDANCE);
    const sessions: ClassSession[] = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
    const map: Record<string, { present: number; total: number }> = {};
    for (const session of sessions) {
      const rec = session.records.find((r) => r.studentId === studentId);
      if (!rec) continue;
      if (!map[session.subject])
        map[session.subject] = { present: 0, total: 0 };
      map[session.subject].total++;
      if (rec.present) map[session.subject].present++;
    }
    return Object.entries(map).map(([subject, data]) => ({
      subject,
      present: data.present,
      total: data.total,
      percentage:
        data.total > 0 ? Math.round((data.present / data.total) * 100) : 0,
    }));
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}


4.2 ROLE-SPECIFIC WELCOME MESSAGE
----------------------------------

function getWelcome(role: string | null, userName: string | null): Message {
  let text: string;
  if (role === "student") {
    text = `Hi ${userName}! I know your attendance, marks, fees, and timetable.
    Ask me anything about your academic records or SNGCE in general!`;
  } else if (role === "staff") {
    text = `Hello ${userName}! I can help you navigate the staff panel,
    enter attendance or marks, understand student records, or answer any college-related questions.`;
  } else if (role === "admin") {
    text = `Welcome ${userName}! I can assist with course management, faculty,
    fees, classified documents, and any institutional queries.`;
  } else {
    text = "Hi! I'm the SNGCE Assistant. Ask me anything about courses,
    admissions, fees, placements, or general questions!";
  }
  return { id: "welcome", role: "bot", text };
}


4.3 ROLE-SPECIFIC QUICK CHIPS
------------------------------

function getChips(role: string | null): string[] {
  if (role === "student")
    return ["My attendance", "My marks", "Fees due", "My timetable"];
  if (role === "staff")
    return ["Enter attendance", "Enter student marks", "View timetable", "Student records"];
  if (role === "admin")
    return ["Manage courses", "Add faculty", "Fee structure", "Classified docs"];
  return ["Courses offered", "Fee structure", "Admissions", "Placements"];
}


4.4 MULTI-QUERY DETECTION
--------------------------

function detectMultipleQueries(text: string): boolean {
  const questionMarks = (text.match(/\?/g) || []).length;
  if (questionMarks >= 2) return true;
  return (
    /\b(also|and also|what about|plus|another question)\b/i.test(text) &&
    text.includes("?")
  );
}


================================================================================
  SECTION 5: FRONTEND — StaffDashboard.tsx (Class Attendance)
================================================================================

5.1 ATTENDANCE COMPUTATION PER STUDENT
---------------------------------------

function computeStudentAttendance(
  studentId: string,
): { subject: string; present: number; total: number; percentage: number }[] {
  try {
    const raw = localStorage.getItem(LS_CLASS_ATTENDANCE_STAFF);
    const sessions: StaffClassSession[] = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
    const map: Record<string, { present: number; total: number }> = {};
    for (const session of sessions) {
      const rec = session.records.find((r) => r.studentId === studentId);
      if (!rec) continue;
      if (!map[session.subject])
        map[session.subject] = { present: 0, total: 0 };
      map[session.subject].total++;
      if (rec.present) map[session.subject].present++;
    }
    return Object.entries(map).map(([subject, data]) => ({
      subject,
      present: data.present,
      total: data.total,
      percentage:
        data.total > 0 ? Math.round((data.present / data.total) * 100) : 0,
    }));
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}


5.2 DEMO STUDENTS FOR STAFF OVERVIEW
--------------------------------------

const DEMO_OVERVIEW_STUDENTS = [
  { studentId: "CSE23001", name: "Amrita Bose",   year: "Year 3", department: "CSE" },
  { studentId: "CSE23002", name: "Rohit Pillai",  year: "Year 3", department: "CSE" },
  { studentId: "CSE23003", name: "Nithya Sunil",  year: "Year 3", department: "CSE" },
];


================================================================================
  SECTION 6: FRONTEND — StudentDashboard.tsx (Attendance Progress View)
================================================================================

{attendance.map((a: Attendance, i: number) => {
  const pct = Math.round(a.percentage);
  const isLow = pct < 75;
  return (
    <div
      key={`${a.subjectId}-${i}`}
      className={`glass p-4 flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center gap-3
        ${isLow ? "border border-amber-500/30" : ""}`}
    >
      <div className="sm:w-48 flex-shrink-0 flex items-center gap-2">
        {isLow && <AlertTriangle size={14} className="text-amber-500 shrink-0" />}
        <span className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground">
          {a.subjectId}
        </span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex-1 flex items-center gap-3">
        <Progress
          value={pct}
          className={`h-2 flex-1 ${isLow ? "bg-amber-500/10" : "bg-foreground/10"}`}
        />
        <span className={`text-sm font-bold w-10 text-right
          ${isLow ? "text-amber-400" : "text-foreground"}`}>
          {pct}%
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
})}
